mano_cua.result_summary: 双重计数bug确认：NumberField组件快速双击+/-按钮时，数值偶发跳变超过1步长（如双击+从2变到5，多计了1次）。单次点击正常（每次+1/-1）。根因是onpointerdown和onclick事件处理器间的竞态条件，rampState.start()的100ms延迟计时器在pointerup之前触发rampUp()设ramping=true，导致click事件再次调用increment()。约50%复现率。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Double-counting bug confirmed. Fast double-clicks on +/- buttons intermittently cause value to jump by 2-3 instead of 1. Race condition between onpointerdown and onclick handlers - rampState timer sets ramping=true before pointerup resets it, causing click handler to fire increment() again.
